title: tiquilia purpusii
intro: Tiquilia purpusii, also known as Purpus' tiquilia or Mexican purslane, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, due to its high concentration of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Tiquilia purpusii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even help lower cholesterol levels. Tiquilia purpusii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be added to soups, salads, and other recipes for its nutritional benefits.
